beats.activity: Wake up, shower, and quick breakfast at home
beats.reasoning: Lucas wakes early as is his habit; yesterday's energy was solid (50/100) and he's optimistic, so he's ready to start the day. Skips the sunrise run today due to rain from 7am–2pm, but maintains his morning routine.

beats.activity: Indoor workout—yoga and light weights at home gym
beats.reasoning: Fitness-obsessed Lucas adapts to the rainy weather by doing an indoor workout instead of his usual outdoor run. Keeps his energy up and routine intact before the commute.

beats.activity: Drive to Pike Place Market stall in Pioneer Square
beats.reasoning: SR-520 eastbound closed 9am–noon; Lucas leaves early (7:45) to avoid the closure and get to the stall before the morning rush. Drives via I-90 westbound instead, adding buffer time but ensuring he arrives well before the closure window.

beats.activity: Work at Pike Place stall; arrange flowers, greet customers
beats.reasoning: Long morning shift at the stall during the rain (7am–2pm). Market is quieter than yesterday due to drizzle and lack of a major event, so Lucas has time to focus on arrangements and chat with regulars. Rain keeps crowds lighter—he prefers this.

beats.activity: Lunch break; grab a specialty coffee and pastry (no drip coffee)
beats.reasoning: Lucas refuses drip coffee, so he grabs an espresso or pour-over from a vendor at Pike Place. Stays at the market to avoid travel time and keep an eye on the stall. Rain is ending by early afternoon, so weather is improving.

beats.activity: Afternoon shift at stall; restock and serve customers
beats.reasoning: Afternoon work continues; rain has cleared by 2pm, market picks up slightly. Lucas is in a good mood and enjoys the steady pace. No major rush, so he's able to chat with customers and enjoy the work.
SR-520 closure is lifted by now (ended at noon), so Lucas takes the bridge back east. Typical evening commute with light traffic. Drives early enough to avoid rush hour.

beats.activity: Dinner; prepare a simple, healthy meal at home
beats.reasoning: Lucas is fitness-conscious and prefers cooking at home. After a solid day at the stall, he makes a light dinner and unwinds. Optimistic mood means he's satisfied with the day's sales and energy.

beats.activity: Knitting and leisure time at home
beats.reasoning: Lucas settles in with his knitting project (the scarf he started yesterday). This repetitive, meditative activity matches his personality and helps him wind down. No social plans tonight—he values quiet time with close friends over big crowds, and tonight is solo.

Lucas goes to bed at a reasonable hour after a satisfying day. Seven hours of sleep will prepare him for another early morning tomorrow. The overnight beat spans into the next calendar day as required.

world_event_prompt: Grey, drizzly Tuesday with steady rain from 7am to 2pm, high of 58F. SR-520 bridge closed eastbound 9am-noon for emergency repair, snarling cross-lake traffic.
